entities.description: René Descartes is a child wearing a yellow hoodie and blue jeans, holding a Totoro plush toy, positioned in the bottom-center foreground of the scene, looking at the young man and touching the elder man.

John D. Rockefeller is an elder man in a blue polo shirt, grey pants, and a silver watch on his left wrist, holding a Logitech MX Keys keyboard, standing in the central mid-ground, hugging the young man, holding the young woman, and being touched by the child.

Muhammad Ali is a young woman wearing a red long-sleeved dress and a black watch on her left wrist, positioned in the middle-right, slightly below the elder man and slightly above the child, looking at and touching the elder man, who is holding her.
